allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('sharp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('csharp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('photoshop'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('visualstudio'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('adobe'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('visual'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('vscode'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('code'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('photoshop'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('adobe'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('steam'\)\).slice\(0,20\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
